title: Session IV — Poster Presentations
notes: Poster presentations will take place in the area adjacent to the main conference room. Each presenter can display an up to A0-sized paper poster at a designated poster board. The poster session will feature all aspects of interventional MRI.

notes: The session will feature preclinical and clinical studies on MRI-guided prostate interventions, such as thermal ablations, biopsies, and high-intensity focused ultrasound.

notes: This social event will invite all faculty and registrants to networking and research discussion. Food and beverages will be served.
